sections.nrsv: A man was going down from Jerusalem to Jericho, and fell into the hands of robbers... But a Samaritan while traveling came near him; and when he saw him, he was moved with pity.
sections.lamsa: A man went down from Jerusalem to Jericho and fell among robbers... But a Samaritan, as he journeyed, came to where he was and had compassion on him.
sections.hart: A man was traveling from Jerusalem to Jericho when he was attacked by robbers... But a Samaritan, seeing him, was moved to compassion.
sections.commentary: Good Samaritan teaches compassion beyond boundaries. Esoteric: The road is life’s journey; the Samaritan is the awakened soul.

sections.nrsv: There was a man who had two sons... But while he was still far off, his father saw him and was filled with compassion.
sections.lamsa: A man had two sons... While he was yet at a distance, his father saw him and had compassion.
sections.hart: A man had two sons... His father saw him coming and ran to embrace him.
sections.commentary: Prodigal Son is about forgiveness and return. Esoteric: The journey away and back is the soul’s path to God.

sections.nrsv: A sower went out to sow... But as for what was sown on good soil, this is the one who hears the word and understands it.
sections.lamsa: A sower went out to sow his seed... The seed in good ground is he who hears the word and understands it.
sections.hart: A farmer went out to sow his seed... The good soil is the one who hears and understands.
sections.commentary: Sower is the teacher; the soils are hearts. Esoteric: Fruitfulness comes from inner readiness.
